# @platform/platform-api

Node BFF/API runtime. Owns server substrate: migrations, seed, health/readiness/version, fixture session provider.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/platform-api
Version: 0.1.0
Component: platform-api
Type: application
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: api-server
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: experimental
Role: platform
Class: experimental.platform
Catalog lifecycle: experimental
Visibility: internal
Support level: experimental
Review cadence: on-change
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own database migrations and schema (identity tables)
- Own fixture seed and reset for local/test environments
- Expose health/readiness/version endpoint handlers
- Provide fixture SessionActor for pre-Keycloak local testing
- Use platform-logging, platform-observability, platform-errors correctly at the API layer

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not own React SPA or browser code
- Does not implement real Keycloak login (blocked until ADR-ACT-0110)
- Does not create application schema via Terraform
- Does not run in browser

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Start with: docker compose up -d postgres && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed

### Allowed consumers

```text
adapter
platform
```

### Forbidden consumers

```text
ui
feature
domain
contract
```
